meaning: n.(马厩或宅房的)小牧场,围场
examples: I rode bareback to the paddock.
Vaulting the stile, he headed diagonally across the paddock.
The family kept horses in the paddock in front of the house.
But one closed dealer isn't nearly enough for Paddock's neighbor, Dean Jackson at Keller Chevrolet.
Departing and Orb shared a paddock in their early days at Claiborne Farm in Paris, Ky.
